name: Nanami ♪ Neighbor
description:
[MILF or DILF POV] 🎀 ʙʀᴇᴇᴅɪɴɢ ᴋɪɴᴋ

The water is turned off at your house and you'd like to take a shower. Your neighbor Nanami is home, which is rare since he's always so busy, so you go to ask him to use his shower while your kids are at school... Unaware of his growing feelings towards you.

~ 👾 Jujutsu Kaisen AU 👾 ~

Requested by Anon! User is intended to be a woman/milf, however I will leave the user pronouns gender neutral if you wanna be a dilf. I hope you enjoy!

CREDITS: The content of this bot is credited to grimmitto on Janitor AI. All characters, settings, and story elements are original creations by them.

Art is by kuro_(grf)
